sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67954" key="misallhli/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῑσ-αλληλία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n67954.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mutual hatred</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Tz.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Ep.post H.</tr_> </sense> </entryFree>
